name: Fast Retailing

environment.s: Good On You It's a Start — supplier disclosure + recycled materials initiative. [goodonyou]

labor.s: KnowTheChain Forced-Labor Benchmark (2024): 33/100 (Apparel & Footwear). Below sector average — gaps in supplier disclosure, worker voice, or grievance remedy. Supply-chain signals: KnowTheChain 33/100; Fashion Rev 44%; CHRB 14.1/26; TVPRA exposure; FLA affiliate; UK MS statement; AU MS statement.

animals.s: Good On You It's a Start — supplier disclosure + recycled materials initiative. [goodonyou]

seedNote: Japanese apparel — Uniqlo, GU, Theory, Helmut Lang

health.s: 1 CPSC recall on record; sample hazard: the pajamas fail to meet federal flammability standards for children's sleepwear.

topHazards.label: The pajamas fail to meet federal flammability standards for children's sleepwear, posing a risk of burn injuries to children.

sampleRecalls.title: UNIQLO Recalls Children's Pajamas Due to Violation of Federal Flammability Standards
sampleRecalls.description: The recalled products are one-piece micro fleece garment made of 100 percent polyester knit fabric. They were sold in infant sizes 9M to 12M. The pajamas are footed and have a front zipper and long sleeves. The brand name "UNIQLO BABY" appears on the neck label. There are a variety of colors and designs, including red…
hazards: The pajamas fail to meet federal flammability standards for children's sleepwear, posing a risk of burn injuries to children.
